name: codex-goalctl
description: Codex skill for coordinating Codex thread goals with codex-goalctl.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Codex thread goals from an orchestrator.
interface.longDescription: Codex Goalctl provides workflow guidance for Codex sessions that assign, inspect, update, and clear persisted thread goals through the codex-goalctl host command.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-goalctl to assign a fresh goal to a Codex thread.
